name: FixedSeat
description: 将指定学生强制分配到固定座位。最先执行，通过 IsFixed 锁定座位，后续策略自动排除。
author: A_Pair Team

description.zh-CN: 为特定学生指定固定座位，该座位将被锁定，不受其他策略影响。
description.en-US: Assign specific students to fixed seats. These seats are locked and excluded from other strategies.

FixedSeat_NotFound.zh-CN: 固定座位 {0} 不存在，已跳过

FixedSeat_Occupied.zh-CN: 座位 {0} 被其他学生占用，已清除后重新分配
FixedSeat_Occupied.en-US: Seat {0} was occupied by another student, cleared and reassigned

FixedSeat_AssignFailed.zh-CN: 分配座位 {0} 给学生 {1} 失败
FixedSeat_AssignFailed.en-US: Failed to assign seat {0} to student {1}
